hero.headline: Your finances. Your device. Your rules.
hero.subheadline: A powerful desktop app for tracking income, expenses, and receivables. No cloud required. No account needed. Your data stays on your device.

trustBadges.noCloudDesc: Data stored locally on your device
trustBadges.noTrackingDesc: No analytics, no telemetry, no spying
trustBadges.exportDesc: Your data in JSON, CSV, or PDF

valueProps.headline: Financial control without compromise
valueProps.subheadline: Built for freelancers and small businesses who value privacy and ownership.

privacy.title: Privacy by design
privacy.desc: Your financial data never leaves your device unless you explicitly export it.

power.title: Professional-grade tools
power.desc: Everything you need to manage clients, projects, and cash flow in one place.

control.title: Total data ownership
control.desc: No vendor lock-in. Export everything, import anywhere, shut down anytime.

problem.headline: Why existing tools fail privacy-conscious users
problem.intro: Most finance tools treat your data as their product. We built something different.
problem.item1Desc: Your financial data lives on servers you don't control, subject to breaches and policy changes.
problem.item2Desc: Analytics, telemetry, and behavior tracking built into every interaction.
problem.item3Desc: Monthly fees for basic features you should own outright.
problem.item4Desc: Exporting your own data is either impossible or intentionally painful.
problem.solution: Mutaba3a is different: a one-time download that works forever, stores data locally, and puts you in complete control.

useCases.headline: One tool for every money moment
useCases.subheadline: From chasing payments to forecasting cash—all in one place.

receivables.outcome: Never forget who owes you money.
receivables.step1: Log income as paid or unpaid
receivables.step2: See overdue receivables at a glance

retainers.step1: Set up client retainers with payment schedule
retainers.step2: Match incoming payments to expected periods
retainers.step3: See missed or partial payments instantly

expenses.outcome: Know exactly where your money goes.
expenses.step3: Set up recurring costs for forecasting

documents.step1: Create invoices, receipts, or credit notes
documents.step2: Auto-fill from client and project data

forecast.outcome: See your financial future before it happens.
forecast.step3: Spot risk days before they arrive

moneyAnswers.headline: Money Answers
moneyAnswers.subheadline: Projection is not prediction. It's a flashlight.
moneyAnswers.card1Desc: See your end-of-month forecast: cash on hand plus expected income minus expected costs.
moneyAnswers.card2Desc: Track unpaid receivables and retainer payments due. Know who owes you and when.
moneyAnswers.card3Desc: Spot surplus or shortfall before making decisions. Plan major expenses with confidence.
moneyAnswers.forecastDesc: Most tools show you what happened. Mutaba3a shows you what's likely to happen—so you can act before problems arrive.

proof.headline: See it in action
proof.subheadline: A native desktop experience built for speed and reliability.

items.dashboardDesc: Your financial overview at a glance

capabilities.headline: Everything you need to manage your finances
capabilities.subheadline: Professional features without the cloud dependency.
capabilities.block3Bullet3: Export to CSV, JSON, or PDF

privacy.headline: Your data. Your device. Your rules.
privacy.intro: Mutaba3a is built for people who care where their financial data lives.

download.headline: Download the desktop app
download.pwaNote: Or use the web app in your browser—works offline after first load.

pricing.headline: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subheadline: Pay once, own forever. No subscriptions. No hidden fees.

web.title: Web App
web.description: Full-featured PWA that works in your browser.

desktop.title: Desktop App
desktop.description: Native macOS and Windows app for serious users.

disclaimer.title: Important: Your data is stored locally
disclaimer.text: Uninstalling the app or clearing browser data will permanently delete all your data. Always export a backup before making changes to your system. You are responsible for your own backups.

faq.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: The web app is free forever. The desktop app is a one-time $49 purchase. No subscriptions.
faq.a2: Locally on your device. The web version uses IndexedDB. The desktop app uses SQLite.
faq.q3: What if I need multiple devices?
faq.a3: Export JSON and import on another device. Cloud sync with end-to-end encryption is on the roadmap.
faq.a4: Yes. After the initial load, the web app works offline. The desktop app always works offline.
faq.a5: USD and ILS are built-in. Track them separately or unified with FX conversion.
faq.a6: Yes. Invoices, receipts, and credit notes—all bilingual (Arabic and English).
faq.a7: The PWA works on mobile browsers. Native mobile apps are on the roadmap.
faq.q8: How do I back up my data?
faq.a8: Export to JSON from Settings. Import on any device instantly.
faq.q9: What's the difference between web and desktop?
faq.a9: Same features. Desktop has native performance and automatic updates.
faq.q10: How can I support the project?
faq.a10: Buy Me a Coffee or purchase a commercial license when available.
faq.q11: What happens to my data if the project shuts down?
faq.a11: Your data stays on your device. Export anytime to JSON. You own it forever.
faq.q12: Can I use it for my business?
faq.a12: Yes, with a commercial license. Contact us for pricing or wait for the self-serve option.

finalCta.headline: Take control of your finances
finalCta.subheadline: Pay once, own forever. No subscriptions. No cloud required.
